title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Clinical Research Coordinator Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Clinical Research Coordinator Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc, M.Sc, B.Pharm, M.Pharm, and Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidat...
